query_normalized: evolutionary pressure on alternative splicing in primates biology
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (e) as it investigates evolutionary pressure on regulatory variation in primates, which is the broader genomic mechanism encompassing alternative splicing, and explicitly focuses on the same empirical population (primates) and domain (evolutionary adaptation of non-coding regulatory elements).
